headline: Top S&P500 movers in Wednesday's pre-market session
summary: The US market session of Wednesday has yet to be opened, let's have a look at the top S&P500 gainers and losers in the pre-market session today.

headline: McCormick Q2 Earnings Coming Up: Essential Insights for Investors
summary: MKC heads into second-quarter earnings with revenue growth expected as pricing, innovation and category demand support sales momentum.

headline: FedEx, Cerebras Systems And Other Big Stocks Moving Lower In Wednesday’s Pre-Market Session
summary: U.S. stock futures mixed, Nasdaq 100 up 100 points. FedEx falls after Q4 results, beating estimates but reporting reduced operating margin. Other stocks also down in pre-market.
